---
title: "Lily Spender"
---

## Lily Spender

**Dates:** (22 Feb 1835-1895)

**Maiden name:** (Headland)

### Description

novelist

### Biography

She married (1858) John Kent Spender MRCS, and had eight children including J.A. Spender and Harold Spender. Being dead she was definitely not the person CMY met at garden party. [ODNB]

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, June 15th 1899](../letters/3408_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
